title: Input schema of the LLM Prompt Response

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.description: One or more prompts to send to the LLM provider. Each prompt produces one dataset item.
prefill: What are the best project management tools for remote teams?

chatgptEmail.title: ChatGPT Email
chatgptEmail.description: Email address for ChatGPT login. Required when provider is 'chatgpt'.

chatgptPassword.title: ChatGPT Password
chatgptPassword.description: Password for ChatGPT login. Required when provider is 'chatgpt'.

chatgptTotpSecret.title: ChatGPT TOTP Secret
chatgptTotpSecret.description: Base32 TOTP secret or otpauth:// URI for ChatGPT two-factor authentication. Optional.
